name: MEDICALHOLODECK®. Surgery, Anatomy, Medicine, Education, and DICOM Imaging in VR. For Medical Students, Nurses, Doctors and Surgeons.
short_description: Study anatomy, segment medical imaging with AI, and exercise surgeries in VR. Designed for future doctors, nurses, and healthcare professionals. ⚡For Meta Quest visit the Meta Store, for iOS the Appstore.⚡
detailed_description:
⚡ For Meta Quest visit the Meta Store ⚡
⚡ Find the iOS app on the Appstore ⚡

Experience medical education in virtual reality. Explore detailed 3D human dissections and 3D anatomy models. Automatically segment CT scans with AI, and exercise surgeries in an immersive environment.

Developed for future doctors, surgeons, nurses, and medical students, Medicalholodeck provides an immersive 3D environment to interact with patient data, medical imaging, high-res anatomical dissections, and anatomy models.

With advanced tools for surgical simulation, AI-powered segmentation, and anatomy study, you can visualize, manipulate, and collaborate on medical content and images.*

Study Anatomy

Explore human anatomy in full 3D, from any angle and scale. Examine pathologies in detail and deepen your medical understanding.

Exercise and Teach Surgery

Visualize surgical procedures using patient data. Import medical images and bridge the gap between theory and practice.

AI-Powered Segmentation

Use AI segmentation to extract and analyze patient data, enhancing study and clinical applications.

Collaborate

Engage in teamwork, share your expertise, and learn together.

Create and Share

Create your own medical content and easily share it in VR with users around the world.

Included Apps

Medical Imaging XR – The high-performance DICOM viewer in VR for surgical training, case reviews and teaching.

Medicalholodeck AI – Advanced AI-driven auto-segmentation for precise anatomical analysis.

Dissection Master XR – VR-based human anatomy atlas and dissection lab, offering professional human dissections.

Anatomy Master 2 – Detailed male and female 3D models for anatomy education.

RecordXR – VR recording tool for capturing and sharing content in 4D.

Key Advantages

Create – Gain 3D insights into patient anatomy, improving diagnosis, training, and efficiency.

Collaborate – Conduct real-time case reviews and surgical discussions, ensuring seamless information exchange.

Teach – Use ultra-high-resolution anatomical models to enhance medical education.

Record and Share – Build a library of interactive VR lessons and case studies for professional and academic use.

Use Cases

Anatomy Teaching – Conduct virtual classes and interactive lessons with 3D anatomy models, dissections, and patient data.

Medical Education – Train in VR with real medical data, interactive simulations, digital twins, AI, and patient data.

Surgical Training – Convert patient data into digital twins for realistic practice.

Patient Information – Present complex medical data to improve patient understanding.

*Important Notice Regarding Functionalities for Surgical Planning and Professional Clinical Usage : The specialized features tailored for surgical planning and pre-operative professional applications are exclusive to Medical Imaging XR PRO. At the moment, Medicalholodeck's applications are only available for educational purposes.

Please be aware that Medicalholodeck is currently undergoing the necessary processes to obtain FDA (U.S. Food and Drug Administration) and CE (Conformité Européene) certifications.

To stay informed about product updates, regulatory progress, and availability, or to address any inquiries, contact info@medicalholodeck.com.
